summary: Iteration 70: Settings Page & Tier-Gating API - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Settings page at /settings with Sound & Audio (Ambient toggle, Sound Effects toggle, Volume slider 0-100%), Visual & Display (4 themes: Dark Cosmic, Deep Midnight, Warm Earth, Sacred Forest with immediate CSS variable updates), Accessibility controls (Reduce Motion, Reduce Particles, Reduce Flashing), Account links (Subscription, Notifications, Profile). Theme changes persist in localStorage as 'cosmic_prefs'. CosmicBackground respects reduce prefs (opacity 0.3 when reduceParticles enabled). Reset to Defaults works. Settings link in profile dropdown. Nav credits badge shows balance and links to /pricing. Tier-gating API: check-access returns allowed:false for premium features on free tier, allowed:true for non-gated features. gated-features returns all 17 gated features with access status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified Settings page and tier-gating. Settings page at /settings has 3 sections: Sound & Audio (toggle-ambient, toggle-sound-effects, slider-ambient-volume), Visual & Display (theme-cosmic, theme-midnight, theme-earth, theme-forest, toggle-reduce-motion, toggle-reduce-particles, toggle-reduce-flashing), Account (links to /pricing, /dashboard, /profile). Prefs stored in localStorage 'cosmic_prefs'. Themes update CSS variables on document root (--bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --primary, --text-primary, --text-secondary, --text-muted). CosmicBackground canvas opacity=0.3 when reduceParticles=true. Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/check-access/{feature} returns allowed:true/false based on tier. GET /api/subscriptions/gated-features returns all 17 gated features. Test user on free tier has 49 credits.

backend_api.GET /api/subscriptions/check-access/sora: ✓ Returns allowed:false for free tier (requires premium)
backend_api.GET /api/subscriptions/gated-features: ✓ Returns all 17 gated features with access status
backend_api.GET /api/subscriptions/my-plan: ✓ Still works - returns tier, balance, perks
backend_api.Pricing data correct: ✓ All tier prices and credit packs correct
backend_api.Nav credits data: ✓ my-plan returns balance for nav badge

frontend_ui.sound_audio_section: ✓ Ambient Soundscape, Sound Effects toggles, Volume slider
frontend_ui.theme_change_immediate: ✓ CSS variables update immediately on click
frontend_ui.reset_to_defaults: ✓ Button resets all settings, shows toast
frontend_ui.settings_in_profile_dropdown: ✓ Settings link visible in nav profile dropdown
frontend_ui.pricing_page_works: ✓ Shows all 5 tiers, credit packs, upgrade buttons
